strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing (e.g., Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Strong background in scaling engineering teams and adopting best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
Recent hands-on involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in stated roles; lacks explicit mention of financial systems or regulatory compliance work
No documented experience with multi-agent AI systems in production beyond early-stage tooling (re:cinq mentions only MCP and agentic workflows)
Scant evidence of leadership at scale for a venture-backed scale-up (roles skew toward individual contributor or small teams)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems expertise, scalable engineering practices, and growing involvement with AI-agent tooling, which aligns with parts of the CTO role. However, his resume lacks critical fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit risk, working-capital systems) and evidence of leading a 10+ person engineering org at a venture-backed scale-up. His recent roles suggest potential but not proven capacity for the executive-level fintech agentic-AI leadership required.
